{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Emperor's key
| introduced = Of Sea and Shadow
}}

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Jerri]] looks for a place to tap [[Emperor (Elder Empire)|the Emperor]]’s key.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c21">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The [[Emperor's key]] is a key that [[Calder]] throws into the water.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c24">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 24</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Of Sea and Shadow]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire artifacts]]
